aries:
♈ Aries – April 2026

🔥 Energy: High drive but unstable mood swings

💼 Career: Fast growth possible, but impulsive decisions setback de sakte hain

❤️ Love: Ego clashes test karenge relationship ko

💰 Money: Income aayegi, par expenses bhi aggressive rahenge

🧘 Advice: Strategy pe kaam karo, speed pe nahi

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum jaldi jeet jate ho, par hold nahi kar paate
taurus:
♉ Taurus – April 2026

🔥 Energy: Stable but resistant to change

💼 Career: Slow progress, but strong base banega

❤️ Love: Comfort zone strong, par excitement missing ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Savings grow hogi

🧘 Advice: Flexibility lao

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Safety kabhi kabhi growth ko rok deti hai

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum start bohot karte ho, finish kam
